original: Electing to have a little fun, you set a course for Poe A and before long, the planet looms before you on the display. It’s not particularly large, for a civilized world, but the traffic for landing vehicles is a little ridiculous. Thousands of craft are coming in every minute, with no sign of the influx slowing down. They’re from all over the galaxy too, even models you’ve never heard of before. Taking your place in the landing queue, you look around at some of the other visitors, eyes watering with envy as you spot a few ships that probably cost as much as this whole planet. Apparently the stories of stars slumming it up during the festival weren’t exaggerated!
Recalling what you’ve read in the invitation letter, the parties held at this location may have a tendency to get way out of hand, resulting in permanent consequences.
You should only proceed if you are definitely sure you want to travel here.

(Poe A is intended to be experienced as a one-time event. Revisiting this location is non-canon and will be treated as if you have been there for the very first time. Keep that in mind and have a Happy Halloween!)

original: Recalling what you’ve read in the invitation letter, the parties held at this location may have a tendency to get way out of hand, resulting in permanent consequences. However there are other options as well: you got another email inviting you to some kind of House of Whorrors if you wanted to go there before heading to the Masque.

(The Masque is intended to be experienced as a one-time event. Revisiting this event is non-canon and will be treated as if you have been there for the very first time. Keep that in mind and have a Happy Halloween!)

original: You probably shouldn’t go back to Poe A after your last trip to ‘The Masque’.
Besides, you have already participated in the festivities for this year - it would be pointless to return again!
(Otherwise, you might want to wait until it is in-season before deciding to travel back there again.)
You might not be able to attend the masque right now, but you could stop by the haunted house"+({var0}?" again..":"")+".
